definitions: a metric unit of area equal to 10,000 square meters

examples.text: A World Bank irrigation project in Ethiopia helped farmers increase their potato harvest from about 8 tonnes per hectare to 35 tonnes.
examples.explanation: Unit of area commonly used in agriculture and land measurement.
